title: Junior Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates
company: Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Junior Instructional Designer at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates:
Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute Asia Pacific Associates!
